narrative.summary:
𝗔𝗥𝗥𝗜𝗩𝗔𝗟

Bedford Ave in Williamsburg — a Friday/Saturday night jazz and live music venue.

Intimate live music space on Williamsburg's main drag. Jazz, soul, and more in a lounge setting. Weekends only.

blocks.title: Arrival
blocks.body:
𝗔𝗥𝗥𝗜𝗩𝗔𝗟

367 Bedford Ave — right on Williamsburg's main artery.

You push through the door into a dimly lit lounge where the music is already happening. Williamsburg Music Center is the kind of place that feels like a secret even though it's on the busiest street in the neighborhood. The programming leans jazz but stretches — you might catch soul, funk, or experimental sets depending on the night.

blocks.title: Space
blocks.body:
𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗦𝗣𝗔𝗖𝗘

Lounge-bar atmosphere with a small stage area. Intimate enough that you feel the music physically. The bar runs full cocktails and the vibe is upscale-casual — you could come from dinner at The Four Horsemen (five minutes away) and fit right in.

blocks.title: The Music
blocks.body:
𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗠𝗨𝗦𝗜𝗖

Live performances Friday and Saturday nights, 9 PM onwards. Check wmcjazz.com for the lineup — it rotates weekly. The focus is jazz but the programming is eclectic.

⭐ Arrive by 9pm for the best seats
⭐ Great as a second stop after dinner in Williamsburg

blocks.title: Check
blocks.body:
𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗖𝗛𝗘𝗖𝗞

💰 $$

Cover: Varies by act (~$15-30)
Cocktails: ~$14-18

🌐 wmcjazz.com
📞 (718) 384-1654

𝗛𝗢𝗨𝗥𝗦
Friday: 9:00 PM – 1:00 AM
Saturday: 9:00 PM – 1:00 AM
Sun–Thu: Closed

𝗕𝗘𝗦𝗧 𝗧𝗜𝗠𝗘𝗦
• Friday night: The main event
• Pair with dinner at Four Horsemen (5 min walk) for a perfect Williamsburg evening

discovery.text: Discovered by Disco via neighbourhood research
